workLog.step: Read issue #1780 via .claude/skills/github/scripts/issue/get_issue_context.py; confirmed P0 priority and three defects: over-broad inline-code extraction, incomplete contextual-section allowlist, and validator-as-veto in workflow
Confirmed via .claude/skills/github/scripts/pr/get_pull_requests.py that no existing PR closes #1780 (PR #1724 is the blocked PR, not the fix)
Read scripts/validation/pr_description.py, tests/test_validation_pr_description.py, and .github/workflows/pr-validation.yml to scope minimal diff
Pulled PR #1724 body via .claude/skills/github/scripts/pr/get_pr_context.py and confirmed `invoke_skill_learning.py` lives in `## Design Decisions`, so section-strip alone resolves the live repro
Verified gh pr view --json labels returns [{"name":"..."}, ...] shape so bypass-label extraction can use label.get('name')

Edited scripts/validation/pr_description.py: added DEFAULT_BYPASS_LABEL constant and _CONTEXTUAL_SECTION_NAMES tuple; broadened _strip_informational_sections to strip Test Plan, Design Decisions, Related, References, See Also, Notes, Background, Inspired By, Pattern From, Prior Art at h2; added labels to gh JSON request; added --bypass-label CLI flag (env DESCRIPTION_VALIDATION_BYPASS_LABEL); main() honors bypass label only in CI mode and only on CRITICAL

Added 12 new tests (10 contextual-section, 1 case-insensitive, 1 h2-only termination, 1 fetch_pr_data labels arg); added TestBypassLabel class with 6 main()-level tests covering present/absent/custom/clean/missing-labels/non-CI paths; updated one pre-existing test (test_strips_test_plan_with_next_heading) to use ## Changes since ## Notes is now in the contextual allowlist
Documented the contextual sections list and description-validation-bypass label in CONTRIBUTING.md alongside the existing commit-limit-bypass guidance
Ran ruff (clean), mypy (clean on changed file), pytest tests/test_validation_pr_description.py + tests/test_pr_description.py (107 passed), full pytest tests/ (7167 passed)
Live repro: CI=true python3 scripts/validation/pr_description.py --pr-number 1724 -> 0 CRITICAL, exit 0 (PR #1724 unblocked)

nextSteps: Create PR with Fixes #1780, enable auto-merge, let required checks gate the squash merge
After merge: monitor next autonomous PR run to confirm contextual references no longer trip the validator
